content: Command palette (quick-switch): opened by Cmd+K/Ctrl+K, modal with search input, fuzzy-filtered list of actions/machines/projects, keyboard arrow navigation + Enter to execute, Escape to close. cmdk is the standard library for React (used by shadcn/ui). Marked HIGH complexity due to state coordination, async data, focus management, accessibility (ARIA combobox role). Three patterns: universal launcher (mix of nav+actions), contextual (only current object actions), recent-first (repeat commands). Add global keydown listener in useEffect. Scope for GSD Cloud: switch between machines, jump to project, trigger remote commands.
